name: Red Onion Pizza
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Canned tomatoes with juice, roughly chopped
1 1/2 cups Very thinly sliced red onion
recipeInstructions:
1. For the sauce: In a large skillet, sauté the vegetables in oil over medium heat for about 5 minutes.
2. Add salt and sugar to the vegetables. Stir occasionally.
3. Add the canned tomatoes with juice and simmer for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally until the mixture thickens.
4. Spread 1/4 cup of sauce over each pizza shell, leaving a 1/4-inch border from the edge.
5. Sprinkle grated mozzarella cheese evenly over the sauce.
6. Top with thinly sliced red onion rings.
7. Place the pizzas on the lowest oven rack and preheat to 400°F (200°C). If using a metal pizza pan, do not preheat it.
8. Bake for 15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
9. Makes 2 medium pizzas, 8 slices each.
Per slice: 171 calories, 21 grams carbohydrates, 6 grams protein, 1 gram fiber, 6.7 grams fat (2 grams saturated), 270 milligrams sodium.
